description: The chatMutation.mutationFn has a 30s timeout but doesn't handle the case where the response is received but JSON parsing fails. Add a try/catch around response.json() and return a structured error so onError can display a specific message.
successCriteria: JSON parsing errors throw a custom error with code 'JSON_PARSE_ERROR'
onError handler checks error.code and displays 'Invalid response from server. Please try again.'
